steps.expected: Test passes - oscillation and conflict are independently detectable
steps.observed: Test passed - can have conflict without oscillation (stagnant siblings) and oscillation without conflict (single tension)

coherenceRules: Oscillation and Resolution are mutually exclusive (if oscillation detected, resolution returns None)
Conflict presence increases oscillation tendency (structural_tendency returns Oscillating when has_conflict=true)
Neglect reduces resolution probability (neglect detection correlates with reduced resolution)
Phase transitions update structural tendency (Germination->Assimilation->Completion progression updates tendency)
